overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic neon-lit city at dusk. The journey transitions from dense urban streets with towering skyscrapers to an open waterfront amusement area featuring a roller coaster, then descends into a dark concrete underpass tunnel beneath a massive mall structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk city street with towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: driving through dense urban streets, overtaking a teal sports car on the left while passing beneath elevated highways

notable_agents.action: teal sports car being overtaken on the left side of the road

entered.detail: tall futuristic towers with glowing yellow and blue neon advertisements
floating digital advertisement displaying product imagery
large yellow illuminated sign on building facade
elevated concrete highway structure with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle navigates through a dense cyberpunk cityscape at dusk, with massive neon-lit skyscrapers dominating the background. The camera passes a teal sports car on the left while driving along asphalt roads beneath elevated highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront amusement park plaza with roller coaster

events.description: exits dense urban street into open waterfront amusement area with visible roller coaster structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the waterfront amusement area with the roller coaster structure becoming prominent in the distance

entered.detail: large metal amusement park ride framework with multiple hills extending over the water
tall tropical palm tree near the waterfront boardwalk
wooden pier structure extending over the calm water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a spacious waterfront plaza as the vehicle leaves the dense city blocks behind. A massive roller coaster structure rises against the pink dusk sky while palm trees line the paved boardwalk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal boardwalk area alongside amusement park structures

events.description: vehicle executes a left turn along the waterfront boardwalk path

agents.ego_description: maneuvering along the waterfront path, turning left while keeping the roller coaster visible to the right side

entered.detail: low wooden fence separating the path from the water
sloped concrete entrance ramp leading up to the main road

segments.scene_description: The vehicle turns left along the coastal boardwalk, with the wooden railing visible on the left and the roller coaster structure now positioned to the right. The Grand Imperial Mall building becomes more prominent ahead as the vehicle approaches the underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete service underpass beneath the Grand Imperial Mall highway

events.description: enters covered underpass beneath the elevated mall and highway structure
ambient natural light drops significantly as vehicle drives deeper into the shadowy underpass

agents.ego_description: descending into the dark concrete underpass beneath the elevated highway, navigating through deepening shadows

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge underpass with support pillars and metal railings above
thick concrete columns holding up the elevated highway
dark opening leading into the underground tunnel section

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the shadowy concrete underpass beneath the Grand Imperial Mall, transitioning from the open waterfront to a sheltered industrial space. The lighting dims considerably as the vehicle approaches the dark tunnel entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark interior tunnel with artificial lighting and graffiti

events.description: game HUD elements appear on screen as vehicle enters deep tunnel section with minimal lighting
surroundings become nearly pitch black with only distant tunnel exit light visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dark tunnel interior with only faint artificial lighting and distant exit glow for visibility

entered.detail: dark concrete walls with graffiti and industrial piping
low concrete ceiling with occasional light fixtures
faint light visible at the far end of the dark tunnel

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives deep into the dark tunnel interior where natural light is completely absent. The HUD interface becomes visible on screen as the vehicle proceeds toward a distant illuminated exit, with graffiti-covered concrete walls passing by in the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous vehicle journey that transitions from a dense, neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis into an open waterfront plaza before descending into a dark industrial underpass. It begins by navigating asphalt roads beneath elevated highways, passing a teal sports car amidst towering skyscrapers at dusk. As the vehicle leaves the city blocks behind, the scene opens into a spacious waterfront area where palm trees line the boardwalk and a massive roller coaster rises against a pink sky. The camera then turns left along the coastal railing, moving past the roller coaster toward the imposing Grand Imperial Mall before entering a shadowy concrete underpass. Finally, the environment shifts from the open air to a sheltered tunnel of graffiti-covered walls, where the lighting dims completely and the HUD interface becomes visible as the vehicle drives toward a distant illuminated exit.
